compiled_state.title: GREEN: Integrate completion verifier into sprint Step 10a and Phase 7
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description
Modify plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md to invoke the dso:completion-verifier agent at two integration points.

**Integration point 1 — Story closure (Step 10a):**
Before the existing ticket transition command in Step 10a, add:
- Dispatch dso:completion-verifier (model: sonnet) with story ID
- Agent reads done definitions via .claude/scripts/dso ticket show
- If pass: proceed with closure
- If fail: do NOT close the story, create remediation tasks, return to Phase 3

**Integration point 2 — Epic closure (Phase 7, between Step 0.5 and Step 1):**
After CI verification (Step 0.5) and before validate-work (Step 1), add:
- Dispatch dso:completion-verifier (model: sonnet) with epic ID
- Agent reads success criteria from epic description
- If pass: proceed to Step 1
- If fail: create remediation tasks, return to Phase 3 (same as existing Phase 8 flow)

**Key constraint:** Remediation tasks created by the verifier must have correct parent epic and priority to be picked up by sprint-next-batch.sh in subsequent batches.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md — Edit

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Sprint Step 10a references dso:completion-verifier
  Verify: grep -A5 'Step 10a' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md | grep -q 'completion-verifier'
- [ ] Sprint Phase 7 references dso:completion-verifier between Step 0.5 and Step 1
  Verify: grep -q 'completion-verifier' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md

**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓

Acceptance criteria verified:
- grep -A5 'Step 10a' returns lines with 'completion-verifier': PASS
- grep -q 'completion-verifier' SKILL.md: PASS  
- grep -q 'Step 0.75' SKILL.md: PASS

Two integration points added to plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md:
1. Step 10a (line 1049-1053): completion-verifier dispatch before ticket closure
2. Step 0.75 (lines 1218-1225): new section between Step 0.5b and Step 1 in Phase 7
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Skill modifications committed and pushed.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
